purpose: Resolve the mirror-state ownership split by making par_325 the sole owner of HubSupplierMirrorState while par_321 may emit a typed bootstrap request after commit.

discipline.responsibility: Emit a mirror bootstrap request when authoritative commit evidence becomes available.

discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Consume bootstrap requests and own all supplier-observation revisions.

discipline.responsibility: Observe mirror drift via read-only deltas for manage posture.
discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Consume mirror-state reads only; no direct writes.
